title: Additional four species of Tatraea in Yunnan Province, China
author: Li, Cui-Jin-Yi

steps.instruction: Figure 4 Tatraea aseptata (HKAS 128275) a–c Fresh ascomata on the wood d–g dried ascomata on the wood h vertical section of an ascoma i–j excipulum k paraphyses l–p asci (o–p asci in Meltzer's reagent) q–v ascospores.
